data.acceptance: When opening that specific history entry (sessionID ses_2bd50fd1affe90pf9TPxctTv1W, messageID msg_d42af031b001E9LrZkGS9Wy7jp), the visible agent label must match the model/provider in the response metadata, not "CODEX GPT-5.4 5.4"; OpenRouter-backed entries should never be relabeled as a local Codex model in the history UI; the history/conversation list must consistently display the same agent/provider source value that is shown in response metadata for all entries; no other fields or workflow behavior should change, only the displayed agent label.
